# /implement

> Drive implementation for a feature whose tasks are validated. Emits F&O source artefacts (X++ classes, AOT objects, DMF projects, ER configurations) under `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/output/`.

## Usage

```
/implement [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--task <object-id>] [--complete]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tasks/*.task.md` (`TASK_VALIDATED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tdd.md` (pseudocode for each method)
- `project.config.yaml`
- [constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md](../../constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md) (X++ coding standards)
- [constitution/02-governance-and-objects.md](../../constitution/02-governance-and-objects.md) (object placement rules)

## Execution flow

1. Build dependency DAG from task `dependencies` lists; topologically sort.
2. For each task:
   - Read task + matching TDD §5 row
   - Generate / modify X++ source per [constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md § Naming](../../constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md) — CoC methods, table extensions, form extensions
   - Author DMF project JSON / ER config for DEN-NN / ER tasks
   - Author security XML for SEC-NN
   - Write artefacts under `output/{object-type}/{object-id}-{name}.{ext}`
   - Update task frontmatter `implementation-status: done`
3. On `--complete`:
   - Run X++ best-practice analyzer output review
   - Validate `unit-test` policy: where `required`, X++ unit-test class file present
   - `currentStates += IMPLEMENTED`; remove `IMPLEMENTING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/output/**`
- Task cards updated

- [constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md](../../constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md)
- [constitution/02-governance-and-objects.md](../../constitution/02-governance-and-objects.md)
